title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at More Retail

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at More Retail
jsonLd.description:
Join the More Retail family as a SEO Specialist in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About More Retail:
More Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
